idea.title: Frost Crack
idea.hook: Send cracks along a frozen lake's grid to encircle and pop out a gem before the whole sheet shatters from stress.
idea.prototype: 8x8 ice-tile grid, top-down canvas. Click a tile edge to fire a crack. Each crack adds +1 stress to the 2 adjacent tiles; tile reaches stress 4 = whole sheet shatters (lose). Win when a closed crack-loop fully encircles the gem (gem unreachable from grid border via 4-connected edge-uncracked path). Daily seed places gem + 6-10 pre-stressed tiles. Mouse-only / tap. Score = fewest cracks. 5 rounds total. Move budget = 32 cracks per round.
idea.mutation_of: Slice It / Hit the Block + Minesweeper
idea.why_novel: Drawing-by-subtraction — every helpful action also loads risk into the board
idea.lose_condition: maxStress >= 4 (shatter) OR cracks >= 32 with gem un-encircled

sources.title: Frost Crack
sources.snippet: Encircle the gem with cracks before stress shatters the sheet

synthesizer_brief: Grid-edge puzzle where every move is dual-edged — your encirclement attempt simultaneously adds stress to the field
